prompt: Create a nostalgic, photorealistic vertical scene titled “the beginning of summer”: a steep old stone stairway descending through a quiet Japanese seaside town at sunset, viewed from behind and slightly above as two Japanese schoolgirls walk downhill side by side. The girls wear summer school uniforms: white short-sleeve blouses, dark plaid pleated skirts, dark socks and shoes, each carrying a dark school bag; their long dark hair and relaxed posture suggest an after-school walk home. The wet or glossy stone steps catch strong orange-pink sunset reflections, creating long dark shadows stretching toward the viewer. Frame the path with exactly two prominent traditional houses, one on the left with a gray tiled roof and one on the right with dark wooden siding and a balcony-like facade; include stone walls, metal handrails, utility poles, small rooftops, and dense greenery along the narrow slope. Overhead, dark tree branches and leaves form a natural silhouette canopy across the top of the image. In the distance, show a calm ocean bay with a glowing vertical trail of sunlight on the water, a low sun near the horizon, small islands or headlands, and a compact coastal neighborhood below. Use warm pink, peach, lavender, and deep indigo, cinematic natural light, high contrast silhouettes, soft haze over the sea, realistic texture in the stones and rooftops, and a quiet nostalgic Japanese summer atmosphere. No text, no watermark, no modern signage, no extra people beyond the two girls.
